sanskrit:
धृत्या यया धारयते मनःप्राणेन्द्रियक्रियाः।
योगेनाव्यभिचारिण्या धृतिः सा पार्थ सात्त्विकी॥
transliteration:
dhṛtyā yayā dhārayate manaḥ-prāṇendriya-kriyāḥ /
yogenāvyabhicāriṇyā dhṛtiḥ sā pārtha sāttvikī //
literal_meaning: By that unwavering dhṛti (determination) which, through unbroken yoga, holds together mind, life-breath and sense-activities—that, O Pārtha, is sāttvic.
contextual_meaning: Healthy ego-strength is the steady, non-fragmented capacity to keep attention, vitality and behavior aligned with one’s chosen value-direction without dissociation or impulsive drift.
psychological_state: Flow-state of sustained, value-anchored attention; low cognitive load from internal conflict; prefrontal governance over limbic reactivity.
trigger_scenario: A coder working from home keeps returning attention to the current ticket instead of doom-scrolling, anchoring each breath and keystroke to the felt sense of writing code that helps users.
anchor_text: Hold mind, breath and senses steady in one chosen direction.
